title: ChestLock
description: Locks a chest with a custom key name
body:
ChestLock Plugin Description

ChestLock is a Spigot plugin designed to add an extra layer of protection to chests in Minecraft. This plugin allows players to lock their chests, preventing unauthorized access by other players. It works seamlessly with the vanilla Minecraft world and offers a simple, user-friendly system for locking and unlocking chests with in-game commands.

Features:
Locking Chests: Players can lock chests to prevent other players from opening them, keeping their items safe.

Command-Based Interaction: Players can use the /chestlock command to lock or unlock chests that they interact with.

Simple Permission Management: Only the player who locked a chest can unlock it. The plugin supports basic permission management.

Works with All Chests: The plugin works with all types of chests, including standard and trapped chests.

Commands:
/chestlock: Locks or unlocks the chest the player is looking at. Only the player who locked the chest can unlock it.

![Command Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ee0ec2dbfe17758db4b944eb2cf4ed05c5b08d2.png)

Permissions:
chestlock.lock: Permission for players to lock and unlock chests.

ChestLock is perfect for multiplayer servers where players want to ensure that their valuable items remain secure, whether on public or private servers.
